title: SACRAMENTO – In a new column,
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The $50 million slush fund proposal could go to protecting illegal immigrants with felony convictions from deportation.
A letter in the legislative journal is NOT legally binding.
The bill could result in taxpayer funds going to the legal defense of undocumented immigrants who have been convicted of a crime.
Democrats rejected a safeguard to prohibit taxpayer-funded legal aid from helping felons.
The rejection of the safeguard is described as disingenuous by legal scholars.
Voters expressed a desire for lawmakers to crack down on crime in the November election.
